suite.name: Api Homework

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/ path_url=/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/does-not-exist path_url=/does-not-exist headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '181', 'ETag': 'W/"b5-quZ2cEADqFmergJvgREfWosPFkc"', 'Date': 'Mon, 23 Mar 2026 11:42:55 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"user_id":3,"username":"mike_wilson","email":"mike@example.com","password":"password789","age":25,"created_at":"2026-02-11T10:10:27.000Z","updated_at":"2026-02-11T10:10:27.000Z"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Create User Without Required Fields Returns 400

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '25'} body=b'{"username": "test_only"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '16'} body=b'{"user_id": "1"}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '11', 'ETag': 'W/"b-EFiDB1U+dmqzx9Mo2UjcZ1SJPO8"', 'Date': 'Mon, 23 Mar 2026 11:42:55 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=Bad Request
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

suite.doc: API smoke and validation tests for Express MVC health app.
